name: Thyroid Panel (Free T3, Free T4, TSH)
description: Measures Free T3, Free T4, and TSH to assess thyroid gland function

name: Thyroid Panel Comprehensive (FT3, FT4, TSH, TGA Abs, TPO Abs, RT3)
description: Comprehensive thyroid panel including hormones and antibodies for autoimmune thyroid disease
shortDescription: Expanded thyroid function and antibody panel

name: Thyroid Peroxidase Abs
description: Detects TPO antibodies associated with Hashimoto’s and Graves’ disease

name: Tissue Transglutaminase IgA
description: Detects IgA antibodies to tissue transglutaminase for celiac disease diagnosis

name: Tissue Transglutaminase IgG
description: Detects IgG antibodies to tissue transglutaminase for celiac disease diagnosis

name: Torch Panel (TOX, RUB, CMV, HRP1, HRP2)
description: Screens for congenital infections including toxoplasmosis, rubella, CMV, and herpes simplex virus

name: Toxoplasma Gondi, Quant. IgG
description: Measures IgG antibodies to Toxoplasma gondii to assess past exposure and immunity

name: Transferrin
description: Measures transferrin levels to assess iron transport and nutritional status

name: Triglycerides
description: Measures triglyceride levels to assess cardiovascular and metabolic health

name: TSH
description: Measures TSH levels to assess thyroid gland function and hormone regulation

name: T-Uptake
description: Measures thyroid hormone uptake to assess binding protein levels and thyroid function

name: Urea, Random Urine
description: Measures urea levels in a random urine sample to assess renal function and nitrogen balance
shortDescription: Kidney function and protein metabolism screen

name: Urea, 24 Hour Urine
description: Measures urea excretion over 24 hours to assess kidney function and protein metabolism
shortDescription: Extended renal function and nitrogen balance screen

name: Uric Acid, Serum
description: Measures serum uric acid levels to assess gout risk and renal function

name: Urinalysis, Microscopic
description: Microscopic examination of urine to detect cells, crystals, casts, and other abnormalities

name: Urinalysis, No Reflex
description: Screens urine for pH, protein, glucose, and other parameters without reflex to culture
shortDescription: Basic urine screening without culture reflex

name: Urinalysis w/Reflex to Culture
description: Screens urine for abnormalities and reflexes to culture if infection is suspected
shortDescription: Urine screening with automatic reflex to culture

name: Urine Culture (Void)
description: Detects and identifies bacteria in voided urine to diagnose urinary tract infections

name: Varicella Zoster Virus Ab., IgG
description: Detects IgG antibodies to varicella zoster virus to assess immunity from past infection or vaccination

name: Vitamin B12
description: Measures vitamin B12 levels to assess nutritional status and anemia

name: Vitamin B12 & Folate
description: Measures vitamin B12 and folate levels to assess nutritional status and anemia

name: Vitamin D, 25-OH, LC/MS/MS (D2, D3, Total)
description: Measures D2, D3, and total 25-hydroxy vitamin D using LC/MS/MS for precise assessment

name: Vitamin D, 25-OH, Total
description: Measures total 25-hydroxy vitamin D to assess bone and immune health

name: Zinc
description: Measures serum zinc levels to assess nutritional and immune health

name: Zinc, Packed RBC
description: Measures zinc levels in packed red blood cells for long-term nutritional assessment
specimenType: Blood (Lavender or Royal Blue EDTA Tube)

name: foodANALYZER (286 Foods) IgG Food Sensitivity
description: Screens for IgG-mediated sensitivities to 286 common foods

name: allergE+ (295 Environmental + Food Allergens) IgE Allergy
description: Screens for IgE-mediated allergies to 295 environmental and food allergens

name: foodANALYZER (286 Foods) & allergE+ (295 Environmental + Food Allergens) IgG & IgE
description: Screens for both IgG and IgE reactions to 286 foods and 295 allergens
shortDescription: Combined food sensitivity and allergy panel

name: Opendx - Deluxe
description: Measures key salivary hormones including testosterone, DHT, progesterone, estrogens, and cortisol

name: Opendx - Supreme
description: Expanded hormone panel including testosterone, DHT, progesterone, estrogens, cortisol x4, melatonin AM/PM, and androstenedione

name: CORTISOL X4, 17-OHP, DHEA
description: Measures salivary cortisol at 4 time points, 17-OH progesterone, and DHEA

name: Toxic Metals Pre-Provocation
description: Measures urinary excretion of toxic metals prior to provocation therapy
shortDescription: Baseline toxic metal screen before chelation

name: Toxic Metals Post-Provocation
description: Measures urinary excretion of toxic metals after provocation therapy to assess detox efficacy
